mapper.select:
SELECT store_id AS storeId, name, category, address, phone, created_data AS createdData, status, titleimage AS titleImage, user_id AS userid FROM store
category = #{category}
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
ORDER BY store_id DESC
SELECT store_id AS storeId, name, category, address, phone, created_data AS createdData, status, titleimage AS titleImage, user_id AS userid FROM store WHERE store_id = #{store_id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO store (name, category, address, phone, created_data, status, titleimage, user_id) VALUES (#{name}, #{category}, #{address}, #{phone}, NOW(), 'OPEN', #{titleImage}, #{userid})
mapper.select: SELECT store_id AS storeId, name, category, address, phone, created_data AS createdData, status, titleimage AS titleImage, user_id AS userid FROM store WHERE user_id = #{userid} ORDER BY store_id DESC
